title: Relato de un náufrago
description: On t.p.: . . . who drifted on a life raft for ten days without food or water, was proclaimed a national hero, kissed by beauty queens, made rich through publicity, and then spurned by the government and forgotten for all time.
subjects: Supervivencia (después de accidentes aéreos, naufragios, etc.)
Ocalenie z katastrof lotniczych, morskich itp
Survival after airplane accidents, shipwrecks, etc.
